TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qu chn.la love vn ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 65%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Pangwi. tay mkyahu' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Ru ja qas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qu chn.la love vn ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ħjaʔ ɣa paŋwi. taj mkjaħuʔ na qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ħjaʔ ɣa ru ja qas~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qu chn.la love vn ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 65%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Pangwi. tay mkyahu' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Ru ja qas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qu chn.la love vn ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ħjaʔ ɣa paŋwi. taj mkjaħuʔ na qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ħjaʔ ɣa ru ja qas~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
